description: Real codebase eval — cqs itself (15K chunks, Rust, fully enriched)

queries.query: search for code by natural language query with optional filters
build HNSW index from stored embeddings
find functions that have zero callers in the codebase
trace the shortest call path between two functions
compute cosine similarity between two embedding vectors
generate natural language description from code chunk
parse source file into functions and classes using tree-sitter
expand search query with synonym OR groups for FTS5
strip FTS5 special characters from search query
find which tests exercise a given function via call graph

load HNSW index from disk and verify checksums
find contrastive nearest neighbors for LLM summary generation
upsert chunks and call graph edges in a single transaction
delete stale chunks from files that no longer exist
migrate SQLite schema from one version to the next
embed text into a vector using the ONNX model
merge search results from multiple reference indexes
extract caller and callee relationships from parsed chunks
gather expanded context via BFS from seed search results
analyze impact of changing a function on callers and tests
suggest where to add new code based on semantic similarity
generate implementation plan from task description
run all scout phases: search callers tests staleness notes
check if index is stale by comparing file mtimes
fuse semantic and keyword search results via reciprocal rank fusion
tokenize camelCase and snake_case identifiers into words
resolve model configuration from CLI flags env vars and config file
watch filesystem for changes and reindex modified files
pack search results into a token budget using greedy knapsack
reconstruct source file from indexed chunks
extract type references from function signatures and bodies
compute BFS reverse transitive callers of a function
normalize file path separators for cross-platform consistency
score a candidate chunk against query embedding with boosts
parse notes from TOML file
apply note sentiment boost to search result scores
split long text into overlapping windows for embedding
run CI analysis with diff impact and risk gating
extract file context for NL description enrichment

find functions similar to a given function by embedding distance
generate semantic diff between two index snapshots

acquire file lock to prevent concurrent indexing
submit LLM batch request for function summaries
